headline: Communities Invited to Help Shape the Valley North Project
summary: The community is invited to a series of open houses beginning June 29 to learn about the new Valley North Project – a major effort to strengthen the power grid across West Virginia, Virginia and Maryland. These open houses are designed for residents to gather information about the project and share what matters most to them in a friendly and collaborative setting.
